name: Bread Pudding Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in an 8-inch square baking dish. Microwave at high (100%) until melted, about 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
2. Stir in bread and toss to coat evenly.
3. In a small bowl, combine half and half, sugar, vanilla, nutmeg, cinnamon, salt, and eggs. Microwave at medium-high (70%) until heated, about 2 1/2 to 3 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture over the bread cubes and mix well. Stir in the raisins.
5. Cover with wax paper. Microwave at medium-high (70%) until the center is soft set, about 8 to 10 minutes.
Makes 4 servings.
